economic_notes: Consolidated entities include Birdtail Sioux General Store Inc., 5503800 Manitoba Ltd., and Assiniboine Valley Cattle Ranch Inc. Lagoon expansion capital project funded by ISC in progress. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $68,288. First Nation in default on two notes payable.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two grounds: (1) no budget comparison presented as required by PSAS, and (2) completeness of Asset Retirement Obligations (ARO) could not be confirmed. Province is Manitoba. Consolidated subsidiaries include Birdtail Sioux General Store Inc., 5503800 Manitoba Ltd., and Assiniboine Valley Cattle Ranch Inc. Large lagoon expansion project funded by ISC resulted in significant restricted cash and deferred revenue balances. First Nation is in default on two notes payable totaling $384,160. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded. Due to ISC liability of $390,229 disputed. Auditor firm identified as MNP LLP based on Winnipeg, Manitoba office address encoding in document header. total_government_transfers = ISC $20,174,683 + CMHC $313,584 = $20,488,267. osr = $30,640,514 - $20,488,267 = $10,152,247. annual_debt_service reflects long-term debt repayments only per cash flow statement.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
